steps: Remember where the car is parked
Lift right leg up off the ground
Extend right leg forward in the direction of the car
Lift left leg up off the ground
Extend left leg forward in the direction of the car
Continue lifting and extending legs until arrival at the car
loop_step: Continue lifting and extending legs until arrival at the car

scenario: Let the attendees into the party
steps: Order hundreds of drinks to venue
Wait for the attendees to arrive
Walk over to the door of the venue

Open the door to let the attendees in
Let the attendees into the party
Repeat until all the attendees have arrived
